notes: 3.11.64 — RA SOAT TOAN APP loi quy doi ngoai te (nhan 2 lan / cong lan ccy): KET QUA SACH — 0 cho nhan doi (cho nghi nhat la reverse-convert DUNG chieu, co chu thich); tong lon deu per-record qua toDisplay/apArToVnd/tach ccy; sum tho deu noi bo 1 phieu don te. Va 2 cho duy nhat: du bao luong cashflow tu quy luong (withdrawals) coi moi ngoai te nhu USD → apArToVnd chuan per-item (VND/USD giu nguyen; ngoai te khac dung fx record; thieu fx fallback _apArFx nhu toan he). Rollback=3.10.41.
